documents.title: PSU bank credit growth accelerates with improving asset quality
documents.content: Public sector banks reported stronger loan growth and stable net interest margins, supporting positive momentum in PSU banking names.

documents.title: Energy basket volatile amid crude swings
documents.content: Oil-linked names saw mixed price action after global crude volatility increased and refining margins narrowed.

documents.title: IT export pipeline remains resilient despite macro caution
documents.content: Large-cap IT firms guided for steady deal wins while management commentary indicated disciplined cost controls.

documents.title: USFDA observations create near-term overhang for select pharma counters
documents.content: Regulatory observations and delayed product approvals raised uncertainty for some pharmaceutical exporters.
